artPrompt: A cackling goblin wizard hurling a spinning coin skyward, fire crackling from his other hand, ember-red and flame-orange washes exploding up the wide frame against night-black smoke. Sparks and confetti spiral, a bonfire glow at his feet, the coin a bright blot of fate mid-air. All reckless gesture and fifty-fifty glee. Gleeful anarchic mayhem, rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Coin Toss Conjurer
text: {R}, {T}: Flip a coin. If you win the flip, Coin Toss Conjurer deals 2 damage to any target. If you lose the flip, it deals 2 damage to you and you say "worth it" out loud.
flavorText: Fifty-fifty odds, one hundred percent commitment.
